title: Baseline Repository Scanner Specification
description: Specifies configuration and output schema for the baseline scanner that enumerates repository files and directories prior to ID assignment.

scanner_config.description: Configuration directives that control the scope of scanning.

repository_root.description: Absolute path to the root directory that will be scanned.

excluded_directories.description: List of directory names or relative paths to exclude from scanning.

excluded_files.description: List of file name patterns to exclude from scanning.

include_hidden_files.description: Whether hidden files (names starting with a dot) should be included in the scan.

follow_symlinks.description: Whether the scanner should follow symbolic links.

output_format.description: Output format of the baseline inventory file.

inventory_schema.description: Schema of a single inventory record produced by the baseline scanner.

object_type.description: The kind of filesystem object ('file' or 'directory').

relative_path.description: Path of the object relative to the repository root.

name.description: Base name of the file or directory.

parent_relative_path.description: Relative path of the parent directory.

extension.description: File extension including the leading dot for files; empty string for directories.

exists_on_disk.description: Indicates whether the object exists on disk at the time of scanning.

is_excluded.description: Indicates whether the object falls under an exclusion rule.
